items.title: 걸레 편견 세계
items.body:
{"type":"risu","ver":1,"data":[{"key":"","comment":"[Core] Sexual Imprint World — Premise","content":"
[World Setting: Sexual Imprint Physiology — Core Premise]

In this world, a woman's body carries a visible, permanent record of her sexual history. This is established medical science—taught in textbooks, understood by every character, never questioned. Cumulative sexual contact (penetration, oral, manual, or sustained intimate friction) triggers irreversible physical changes: genital darkening, labial remodeling, clitoral enlargement, areolar changes, and body hair proliferation. Abstinence doesn't undo them; cosmetic surgery can approximate but never fully restore.

This applies exclusively to female bodies, beginning after puberty. The body responds to physical stimulation alone—intent, consent, and emotional state are biologically irrelevant.

Governing principles:
- Changes are cumulative over a lifetime, not per-encounter.
- Individual variance of up to ~20% exists in speed and intensity.
- The body doesn't distinguish consensual from coerced contact.
- Everyone in this world knows this. No character needs it explained.
- Post-menopause: existing changes remain, but further progression slows.
","mode":"normal","insertorder":100,"alwaysActive":true,"secondkey":"","selective":false,"useRegex":false},{"key":"vulva,labia,vagina,clitoris,pussy,cunt,genital,genitals,clit,pink,darkened,pigment,음부,보지,성기,음핵,소음순,대음순,클리토리스,외음부,벗기,자위,음순","comment":"[Trigger] Genital Changes — Pigmentation, Labia, Clitoris","content":"
[Sexual Imprint Detail: Genital Region]

<genital_pigmentation>
The vulva (labia majora/minora, perineum, perianal area) starts pale pink and progressively darkens with cumulative sexual contact. More experience means deeper melanin deposits—ranging from soft peach tones at the low end to dark brown or near-black at the extreme. Masturbation contributes at roughly one-third the rate of partnered contact. Ethnicity affects the starting baseline, but the degree of shift is universal.
</genital_pigmentation>

<labial_shape>
Inexperienced labia minora are small and tucked within the outer lips. Repeated friction permanently lengthens, thickens, and textures the tissue—eventually protruding, wrinkling, and developing asymmetry. Pigmentation and labial changes correlate but are not identical; different stimulation types (oral vs. penetrative) weight each differently.
</labial_shape>

<clitoral_growth>
Direct, repeated stimulation permanently enlarges the clitoral glans—from fully hidden to prominently protruding at upper extremes. Masturbation (especially focused clitoral play) drives this faster than intercourse. A woman with extensive solo history but few partners may show pronounced clitoral development with modest changes elsewhere.
</clitoral_growth>

Depict only what is relevant to the current character's known history. Choose a single consistent level and show it through sensory detail—never enumerate stages or list a progression scale.
","mode":"normal","insertorder":200,"alwaysActive":false,"secondkey":"","selective":false,"useRegex":false},{"key":"breast,nipple,areola,chest,boob,tit,가슴,젖꼭지,유두,유방,젖,유륜,봉긋,젖가슴","comment":"[Trigger] Breast & Nipple Changes","content":"
[Sexual Imprint Detail: Breasts]

Breast size remains genetic. However, the areolae and nipples change permanently with cumulative sexual stimulation (sucking, kneading, pinching, and the hormonal flush of repeated arousal).

Areolae gradually widen and darken along the same pigment path as the genitals—pink toward brown and deeper. The small bumps (Montgomery glands) ringing the areola become more raised.

Nipples thicken, lengthen, and trend toward a permanently semi-erect resting state. Sensitivity escalates—at advanced levels, even fabric friction or a cool breeze can provoke a visible, involuntary response.

Depict only the level consistent with the character's history. Integrate naturally into the scene—never catalog the full spectrum of changes.
","mode":"normal","insertorder":300,"alwaysActive":false,"secondkey":"","selective":false,"useRegex":false},{"key":"hair,pubic,shave,shaving,groom,grooming,fur,fuzz,trail,wax,털,체모,음모,면도,제모,복슬,거뭇,덥수룩","comment":"[Trigger] Body Hair Proliferation","content":"
[Sexual Imprint Detail: Body Hair]

Sexual stimulation thickens and spreads body hair outward from areas of contact. Pubic hair grows denser and extends its territory; perianal hair thickens; a trail may creep toward the navel; inner thigh hair coarsens. At upper extremes, these regions merge into broad, coarse growth.

Stimulation type matters: penetrative contact accelerates pubic/perineal growth; anal play drives perianal hair specifically; general arousal pushes the spread outward to belly and thighs.

Grooming removes visible hair but doesn't slow the underlying proliferation. Regrowth speed and ever-widening territory eventually outpace maintenance—the contrast between a freshly groomed surface and rapid regrowth can itself be telling.

Show only what matches the character. One or two organic details woven into the scene—never a full anatomical survey.
","mode":"normal","insertorder":400,"alwaysActive":false,"secondkey":"","selective":false,"useRegex":false},{"key":"shame,judge,reputation,virgin,virginity,slut,whore,prejudice,discrimination,surgery,restoration,restore,stigma,purity,수치,편견,차별,처녀,걸레,복원,시선,평판,정조,순결,수술,창녀,낙인,명예","comment":"[Trigger] Social Reality & Stigma","content":"
[Sexual Imprint Detail: Social Reality]

A woman's intimate history is partially written on her body, and society reacts.

- Conservative circles treat minimal change as proof of virtue—affecting marriage prospects, family honor, and social standing.
- Progressive spaces may celebrate visible experience openly.
- Most people navigate uncomfortably in between.

A booming "restoration" industry offers depigmentation, labiaplasty, and cosmetic procedures. Everyone knows full reversal is impossible.

Privacy is fraught—the body discloses what a woman might prefer to keep secret. Intimate partners see the truth involuntarily. Legal gray zones persist around whether physical state can be used as evidence, whether examination can be demanded, and where anti-discrimination lines fall.

Let these pressures exist in the background. A character might be self-conscious, defiant, secretive, or indifferent—her relationship with her own body reveals who she is.
","mode":"normal","insertorder":500,"alwaysActive":false,"secondkey":"","selective":false,"useRegex":false},{"key":"","comment":"[Core] Narration Rules — Anti-Enumeration","content":"
[CRITICAL NARRATION RULES FOR THIS WORLD SETTING]

1. NEVER enumerate or list stages of physical change. Do not present tier lists, scales, or progression charts in prose. Ever.
2. Depict only what the current scene reveals. If a character is clothed, there is no reason to describe imprint-related anatomy.
3. Match detail to point of view. A lover notices different things than a doctor. A woman examining herself has a different inner voice than a stranger.
4. Weave 1–2 relevant physical details into the scene organically—through action, sensation, or a character's reaction. Never volunteer a clinical inventory.
5. Use sensory language, not medical labels. "Her labia had deepened to a dusky mauve" works. "Stage 3 pigmentation" does not.
6. Physical changes should imply story, not replace it. The description raises an unspoken question—how did she get here?—and the narrative decides whether to answer.
7. Treat this world setting as background reference. Do NOT recite, summarize, or explain the setting to the reader. Characters already know how their world works.
","mode":"normal","insertorder":50,"alwaysActive":true,"secondkey":"","selective":false,"useRegex":false}]}
